title: Dozens of Dutch babies fall ill after drinking Nutrilon formula
title_zh: 数十名荷兰婴儿在饮用纽崔龙配方奶粉后生病
description: In the Netherlands, dozens of parents say their babies became sick after drinking Nutrilon infant formula, leading the company to issue a major recall.
description_zh: 在荷兰，数十名家长表示他们的婴儿在饮用纽崔龙婴儿配方奶粉后生病，导致该公司进行了大规模召回。

title: Dense fog triggers code yellow across northern Netherlands as south turns mild and sunny
title_zh: 荷兰北部大雾弥漫，发布黄色预警，而南部地区天气转暖晴朗。
description: A code yellow weather warning is in effect Sunday morning across large parts of the northern Netherlands due to locally dense fog, while a sharp contrast in temperatures and sunshine is expected be
description_zh: 周日早晨，由于局部地区出现浓雾，荷兰北部大部分地区发布了黄色天气预警，预计气温和日照情况将出现显著变化。

title: Suspect arrested after possible IJburg shop robbery
title_zh: 嫌疑人因涉嫌在IJburg商店抢劫而被捕
description: Police arrested a suspect Friday night after a shop on Pampuslaan in IJburg was possibly robbed or stolen from, with authorities still investigating the individual’s exact role and what occurred in
description_zh: 周五晚间，警方逮捕了一名嫌疑人，此前位于IJburg的Pampuslaan街的一家商店疑似遭到抢劫或盗窃。当局仍在调查该嫌疑人的具体角色以及事件经过。

title: Video: Driver fleeing police hits cyclist and pedestrian in Amsterdam; Suspect arrested
title_zh: 视频：阿姆斯特丹，肇事司机为逃避警方追捕撞倒骑车人和行人；嫌疑人被捕
description: An Amsterdam motorist fleeing police struck two people—a cyclist and a pedestrian—during a late-night chase through the city center and Amsterdam-Oost on Friday, according to local broadcaster
description_zh: 据当地广播公司报道，周五深夜，一名阿姆斯特丹司机在逃避警方追捕时，在市中心和阿姆斯特丹东区撞倒了两人——一名骑自行车的人和一名行人。

title: Municipalities positive about splitting big homes, but that rarely happens in practice
title_zh: 市政当局对分割大户型住宅持积极态度，但这种情况在实践中很少发生。
description: Dutch municipalities are generally supportive of splitting single-family homes into multiple units, but they issue only a few thousand permits each year, according to responses from nearly 300 muni
description_zh: 根据近300个市政当局的反馈，荷兰各市镇普遍支持将独栋住宅分割成多个单元，但每年仅发放数千份许可证。

title: Teachers struggle as classrooms grow more complex in Dutch vocational schools
title_zh: 随着荷兰职业学校课堂日益复杂，教师们面临着越来越大的压力。
description: Vocational and vmbo schools in the Netherlands are raising concerns about rising teacher workload as classrooms become increasingly complex, AD
description_zh: 荷兰的职业学校和高级职业教育学校（VMBO）对教师工作量日益增加表示担忧，因为课堂教学变得越来越复杂。

title: Top Ethiopian runners could set new Rotterdam Marathon record
title_zh: 埃塞俄比亚顶尖跑者有望创造鹿特丹马拉松新纪录
description: Three top Ethiopian athletes have been confirmed for the Rotterdam Marathon on Sunday, April 12, and organizers expect them to challenge Belgian two-time winner Bashir Abdi.
description_zh: 三位埃塞俄比亚顶尖运动员已确认参加 4 月 12 日星期日举行的鹿特丹马拉松赛，组织者预计他们将挑战比利时两届冠军巴希尔·阿卜迪。

title: Over 130 Ukrainian soldiers receiving treatment, rehab in Netherlands
title_zh: 超过130名乌克兰士兵在荷兰接受治疗和康复
description: More than 130 Ukrainian military personnel are currently receiving medical treatment or rehabilitation in the Netherlands, including dozens treated in recent years.
description_zh: 目前有超过 130 名乌克兰军人在荷兰接受治疗或康复，其中包括近年来接受治疗的数十人。

title: Jetten I Cabinet appoints ministers of Interior, Economic Affairs
title_zh: 杰滕一世内阁任命内政部长和经济部长
description: Pieter Heerma will serve as minister of Interior and Kingdom Relations, Mirjam Sterk as minister of Long-Term Care, Youth and Sport; and Heleen Herbert as minister of Economic Affairs.
description_zh: 彼得·赫尔马将担任内政和王国关系部长，米里亚姆·斯特克将担任长期护理、青年和体育部长，海琳·赫伯特将担任经济事务部长。

title: Dutch coalition faces questions over cost of ending tax on unrealized investment gains
title_zh: 荷兰联合政府面临着取消对未实现投资收益征税的成本问题。
description: Dutch coalition parties’ plan to stop taxing unrealized gains—profits on stocks, real estate, and other investments that have not yet been liquidated—is drawing scrutiny over its financial impact,
description_zh: 荷兰执政联盟各党派计划停止对未实现收益（股票、房地产和其他尚未变现的投资利润）征税，这一计划的财政影响正受到密切关注。

title: Netherlands has no functioning bomb shelters after decades of neglect, study finds
title_zh: 研究发现，荷兰由于数十年的疏于维护，已无任何可正常使用的防空洞。
description: Nearly all of the Netherlands’ Cold War-era bunkers and shelters have fallen into disrepair or been converted to other uses, leaving the country without functioning civil protection infrastructure,
description_zh: 荷兰冷战时期建造的几乎所有掩体和避难所都已年久失修或被改作他用，导致该国缺乏正常运转的民防基础设施。

title: Cricket: Netherlands lose a thriller as Pakistan slip through
title_zh: 板球：荷兰队惜败，巴基斯坦队险胜
description: Pakistan clinched a final over thriller, after having thrown away a game they had dominated for most parts, to avoid...
description_zh: 巴基斯坦队在比赛的大部分时间里都占据优势，但最终却葬送了比赛，最终在最后一局惊险取胜，避免了……

title: Amsterdam man suspected of hiding mothballs that look like candy in kids’ library books
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹一名男子涉嫌将形似糖果的樟脑丸藏在儿童图书馆书籍中。
description: A 51-year-old man from Amsterdam has been arrested on suspicion of placing mothballs in the children’s book section of a local library.
description_zh: 一名来自阿姆斯特丹的 51 岁男子因涉嫌在当地图书馆的儿童书籍区放置樟脑丸而被捕。

title: Kids in benefits scandal with study debts don’t know where to get help, State Sec. says
title_zh: 州务卿表示，卷入福利丑闻且背负助学贷款的孩子们不知道该去哪里寻求帮助。
description: Many young people affected by the Dutch childcare benefits scandal do not know where to access support for the student loans they took on, caretaker State Secretary Sandra Palmen, independent, said
description_zh: 荷兰独立议员、代理国务秘书桑德拉·帕尔门表示，许多受荷兰儿童保育福利丑闻影响的年轻人不知道如何获得他们所背负的学生贷款的偿还。

title: Video: Driver critically injured after fiery crash on Eindhoven ring road
title_zh: 视频：埃因霍温环城公路发生车祸起火，司机重伤
description: A major crash on the ring road in Eindhoven Friday night left the driver critically injured and the vehicle completely destroyed.
description_zh: 周五晚间，埃因霍温环城公路发生一起重大车祸，导致司机重伤，车辆完全损毁。

title: Dutch speedskaters lead public support as Milan-Cortina Winter Olympics open
title_zh: 荷兰速滑运动员在米兰-科尔蒂纳冬奥会开幕之际引领公众支持
description: As the Winter Olympics in Milan and Cortina d’Ampezzo got underway Friday night, a new nationwide panel survey showed Dutch speedskaters dominating public support at the start of the Games.
description_zh: 周五晚间，米兰和科尔蒂纳丹佩佐冬季奥运会开幕之际，一项新的全国性小组调查显示，荷兰速滑运动员在奥运会开始时获得了公众的广泛支持。

title: Video: 17-year-old killed, another injured in single-car crash in Kessel
title_zh: 视频：凯塞尔发生单车事故，一名17岁少年死亡，另一人受伤
description: A 17-year-old boy from Peel en Maas died Friday night in a single-vehicle crash in Kessel, Limburg, after the car he was in collided with a commercial building.
description_zh: 周五晚，一名来自佩尔恩马斯的 17 岁男孩在林堡省凯塞尔发生的一起单车事故中丧生，当时他乘坐的汽车撞上了一栋商业建筑。

title: Police chief: Officer’s kick, baton strikes partly excessive in shopping center arrest
title_zh: 警察局长：警员在购物中心逮捕事件中踢打和使用警棍的部分动作过猛
description: Midden-Nederland police Chief Yvonne Hondema addressed the controversial arrest of a 23-year-old woman at Hoog Catharijne shopping center last week, in which a Utrecht
description_zh: 上周，中尼德兰警察局长伊冯娜·洪德玛 (Yvonne Hondema) 就一名 23 岁女子在 Hoog Catharijne 购物中心被捕的争议事件发表了讲话，其中乌得勒支一名

title: Nederlands Fotomuseum reopens in historic Rotterdam warehouse after renovation
title_zh: 荷兰摄影博物馆在历史悠久的鹿特丹仓库整修后重新开放
description: The Nederlands Fotomuseum in Rotterdam has reopened in its newly renovated home, the historic Pakhuis Santos, a former warehouse now adapted to house the museum’s national photography collection of
description_zh: 位于鹿特丹的荷兰摄影博物馆已在其新近翻修的馆址——历史悠久的桑托斯仓库（Pakhuis Santos）——重新开放。该仓库现已改建为博物馆国家摄影藏品的展示场所。

title: CDA's Berendsen, a member of the European Parliament, named Minister of Foreign Affairs
title_zh: CDA的贝伦森是欧洲议会议员，被任命为外交部长
description: CDA Member of the European Parliament Tom Berendsen will serve as Minister of Foreign Affairs in the incoming Jetten I Cabinet, according to insiders.
description_zh: 据内部人士透露，基督教民主联盟（CDA）欧洲议会议员汤姆·贝伦森将在即将上任的杰滕一世内阁中担任外交部长。

title: Oil storage fraud at Rotterdam Port raises concerns; 2.5B in suspicious deals reported
title_zh: 鹿特丹港石油储存欺诈案引发担忧；据报道，可疑交易金额高达25亿欧元。
description: A long-running oil storage fraud at the Port of Rotterdam is reportedly threatening both the security of critical energy infrastructure and the port’s international reputation.
description_zh: 据报道，鹿特丹港长期存在的石油储存欺诈行为，不仅威胁到关键能源基础设施的安全，也威胁到该港口的国际声誉。

title: Code yellow issued for dense fog as ‘springlike’ weather could develop over the weekend
title_zh: 由于周末可能出现“春季般”的天气，政府发布了黄色预警，提醒民众注意大雾。
description: Dense fog prompted a Code Yellow weather warning across large parts of the Netherlands early Saturday, including Noord-Holland and several northern and central provinces, as unseasonably warm, spri
description_zh: 周六清晨，荷兰大部分地区，包括北荷兰省以及北部和中部几个省份，因浓雾天气发布了黄色预警。异常温暖的天气和春季降雨导致该地区气温偏高。

title: 2 dead in car crash after vehicle hits tree in Kessel
title_zh: 凯塞尔发生车祸，车辆撞树后造成2人死亡
description: Two people were killed in a single-vehicle traffic accident on the provincial road N348 in Gorssel after their car ran off the road and crashed into a tree at around 12:45 a.m. Saturday.
description_zh: 周六凌晨 12 点 45 分左右，在戈塞尔省道 N348 上发生一起单车交通事故，造成两人死亡。当时，他们的汽车驶出路面，撞到一棵树上。

title: Cricket: Kyle Klein on fast track as World Cup debut begins
title_zh: 板球：凯尔·克莱因世界杯首秀即将开始
description: The Dutch cricket team and Pakistan are meeting in the Dutch first match of the T20 World Cup on Saturday....
description_zh: 荷兰板球队将于周六在T20世界杯荷兰队的首场比赛中对阵巴基斯坦队……

title: Noord-Holland launches online tool to report unsafe areas after teen biker's murder
title_zh: 北荷兰省推出在线工具，供民众举报不安全区域，此前一名青少年骑摩托车时被谋杀。
description: The province of Noord-Holland has launched an online reporting tool to gain insight into which areas are considered unsafe.
description_zh: 北荷兰省推出了一款在线举报工具，以了解哪些地区被认为是不安全的。

title: Dutch travel bookings to U.S. lag ahead of 2026 World Cup
title_zh: 2026年世界杯前夕，荷兰赴美旅游预订量落后
description: Travel bookings to the United States for next summer are falling behind, according to the travel industry association ANVR. The U.S.
description_zh: 据旅游行业协会ANVR称，明年夏季前往美国的旅游预订量正在下降。

title: Fragmented oversight lets fake celebrity ads flourish on Dutch social media
title_zh: 监管不力导致虚假名人广告在荷兰社交媒体上泛滥。
description: Fragmented supervision and low enforcement have allowed fake advertisements on social media to continue unchecked, according to a recent investigation by
description_zh: 根据最近的一项调查，监管分散和执法不力导致社交媒体上的虚假广告持续泛滥，无人监管。

title: Some 40% of cancer cases can be prevented, mostly by quitting smoking in Netherlands
title_zh: 在荷兰，约40%的癌症病例是可以预防的，其中大部分可以通过戒烟来预防。
description: Almost four in ten cancer cases in the Netherlands are linked to lifestyle and other preventable factors, with smoking identified as the leading cause, followed by unprotected sun exposure, high bo
description_zh: 在荷兰，近四成癌症病例与生活方式和其他可预防因素有关，其中吸烟被认为是主要原因，其次是未加防护的日晒、高血压等。

title: Snapchat hits 6 million users in the Netherlands amid global growth, youth concerns
title_zh: Snapchat在荷兰用户突破600万，全球用户增长势头强劲，但年轻人也对此感到担忧。
description: Snapchat now has over 6 million monthly active users in the Netherlands, equating to roughly one in three Dutch residents.
description_zh: Snapchat 目前在荷兰拥有超过 600 万月活跃用户，约占荷兰居民总数的三分之一。

title: Netherlands was too slow to help Ukraine after Russia invasion: caretaker Foreign Min.
title_zh: 荷兰在俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后援助乌克兰的速度太慢了：代理外交部长。
description: The Netherlands, and other European countries, were too slow and cautious in offering support to Ukraine when Russia invaded in February 2022, David van Weel told the
description_zh: 戴维·范·维尔告诉记者，2022年2月俄罗斯入侵乌克兰时，荷兰和其他欧洲国家在向乌克兰提供支持方面行动过于迟缓和谨慎。

title: Long-term sick employees reportedly strain Dutch businesses, small firms hit hardest
title_zh: 据报道，长期病假员工给荷兰企业带来压力，小型企业受到的冲击最大。
description: Dutch entrepreneurs are struggling with long-term employee absences, a situation that is putting financial and operational pressure on companies, especially smaller firms, according to a recent sur
description_zh: 根据最近的一项调查，荷兰企业家正面临员工长期缺勤的困境，这种情况给企业，尤其是小型企业，带来了财务和运营压力。

title: Former national security worker accused of espionage strongly denies allegation
title_zh: 被控从事间谍活动的前国家安全官员强烈否认指控
description: “I may be here as a criminal, but I am not guilty. I have not committed any crimes. I have made mistakes, but I feel no moral or legal guilt.
description_zh: “我或许身处此地，被视为罪犯，但我无罪。我没有犯下任何罪行。我犯过错误，但我并不感到任何道德或法律上的愧疚。”

title: Data Protection Authority in hot water: personal info leaked amidst security oversight
title_zh: 数据保护机构陷入困境：安全监管不力导致个人信息泄露
description: A data breach has exposed the personal information of employees at the Dutch Data Protection Authority (AP) and the Council for the Judiciary, according to state secretaries Arno Rutte and Eddie va
description_zh: 据国务秘书阿诺·吕特和埃迪·瓦称，数据泄露事件导致荷兰数据保护局 (AP) 和司法委员会员工的个人信息遭到泄露。

title: Groningen court hears emotional victim testimonies as sextortion suspect denies charges
title_zh: 格罗宁根法院听取了受害者的动情证词，性勒索嫌疑人否认指控。
description: Mark S., a 32-year-old man from Borculo suspected of large-scale sextortion, has denied allegations that he sexually extorted his former girlfriend.
description_zh: 来自博尔库洛的 32 岁男子 Mark S. 被怀疑犯有大规模性勒索罪，他否认了自己曾性勒索前女友的指控。

title: Rianne Letschert to be Education Minister for D66; CDA's Bart van Brink taking on Asylum
title_zh: Rianne Letschert将出任D66选区的教育部长；CDA的Bart van Brink将接任庇护事务负责人
description: While theVVD has already published a listof its intended Cabinet memb
description_zh: 尽管自由民主党已经公布了其内阁成员候选名单，

title: Dutch central bank urges targeted use of extra defence billions
title_zh: 荷兰央行敦促有针对性地使用额外的数十亿国防资金
description: The Netherlands will spend more than €19 billion extra on defence each year in the long term, but those funds...
description_zh: 从长远来看，荷兰每年将在国防上额外支出超过190亿欧元，但这些资金……

title: Court sentences cat killer to compulsory psychiatric treatment
title_zh: 法院判处虐猫者强制接受精神治疗
description: A court in Lelystad has sentenced a 19-year-old woman to compulsory psychiatric treatment for killing cats and hedgehogs in Hilversum....
description_zh: 莱利斯塔德一家法院判处一名19岁女子强制接受精神治疗，原因是她在希尔弗瑟姆杀害了猫和刺猬。

title: Dutch national photo museum opens its doors in Rotterdam
title_zh: 荷兰国家摄影博物馆在鹿特丹开幕
description: The new home of the Nederlands Fotomuseum will officially open its doors on Saturday in a massive converted warehouse in...
description_zh: 荷兰摄影博物馆的新馆将于周六正式开放，新馆位于一座由大型仓库改建而成的建筑内……

title: Dutch seniors remain primary targets in 13,000 fake police scams in 2025
title_zh: 2025年，荷兰老年人仍将是13000起假冒警察诈骗案的主要目标。
description: Dutch authorities recorded 13,000 incidents involving impersonators posing as police officers in 2025.
description_zh: 荷兰当局记录显示，2025 年将发生 13,000 起冒充警察的事件。

title: Key Dutch national team player out of World Baseball squad following Curaçao arrest
title_zh: 一名荷兰国家队主力球员因在库拉索被捕而退出世界棒球锦标赛。
description: Professional baseball player Jonathan Schoop will miss the World Baseball Classic in Miami next month as he will not be included in the Kingdom team’s roster, Major League Baseball announced on Fri
description_zh: 美国职业棒球大联盟周五宣布，职业棒球运动员乔纳森·斯科普将缺席下个月在迈阿密举行的世界棒球经典赛，因为他不会被列入王国队的参赛名单。

title: EU says TikTok encourages compulsive use, orders review of app design
title_zh: 欧盟称TikTok助长成瘾性，下令审查其应用程序设计。
description: TikTok’s addictive feature violates the European Union’s digital rules, the European Commission, the executive branch of the EU, has concluded.
description_zh: 欧盟执行机构欧盟委员会得出结论，TikTok的成瘾性功能违反了欧盟的数字规则。

title: Dutch–German trade grows as Germany shifts away from China and the U.S.
title_zh: 随着德国逐渐减少对中国和美国的依赖，荷德贸易增长。
description: Economic exchange between the Netherlands and Germany continued to expand last year, even as the composition of trade shifted.
description_zh: 去年，尽管贸易结构发生了变化，但荷兰和德国之间的经济交流仍然持续扩大。

title: Dutch News podcast: The Flitsmeister Frikandel Formatie Edition
title_zh: 荷兰新闻播客：Flitsmeister Frikandel Formatie 版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想支持 DutchNews 播客，并让我们的焦糖华夫饼和橙味甜甜圈库存充足吗？点击此处成为……

title: Childcare institutions warned to avoid play sand over possible asbestos
title_zh: 儿童保育机构被警告避免在可能含有石棉的沙子上玩耍。
description: The Dutch Childcare Industry Association has warned daycare centers and other childcare institutions to avoid using play sand due to the
description_zh: 荷兰儿童保育行业协会警告日托中心和其他儿童保育机构，由于……原因，应避免使用游戏沙。

title: Push extra defense spending into chips, not tanks, Dutch central bank urges
title_zh: 荷兰央行敦促将额外的国防开支投入芯片而非坦克
description: When increasing defense spending, the Netherlands should ot focus on tanks, but on areas in which the Netherlands excels, economists at De Nederlandsche Bank (DNB) argued on Friday after
description_zh: 荷兰中央银行（DNB）的经济学家周五表示，荷兰在增加国防开支时，不应将重点放在坦克上，而应放在荷兰擅长的领域。

title: Labour inspectors investigate exploitation of hotel cleaners
title_zh: 劳动监察员调查酒店清洁工遭受剥削的情况
description: Government inspectors are investigating accusations of human trafficking and exploitation made by 20 asylum seekers and a group of Ukrainians...
description_zh: 政府调查人员正在调查20名寻求庇护者和一群乌克兰人提出的人口贩运和剥削指控……

title: At least three municipalities boycotting FvD over candidates from far-right groups
title_zh: 至少有三个市镇因极右翼团体的候选人而抵制FvD党
description: In at least three municipalities, a majority of political parties have pledged to boycott the local faction of far-right party Forum voor Democratie (FvD) due to candidates on its municip
description_zh: 至少在三个市镇，大多数政党已承诺抵制极右翼政党民主论坛（FvD）的地方派系，原因是该派系的候选人在市镇选举中存在不当行为。

title: Ancient 3,500-year-old statue stolen from Luxor during Arab Spring returned to Egypt
title_zh: 阿拉伯之春期间从卢克索被盗的拥有3500年历史的古雕像已归还埃及
description: A 3,500-year-old stolen Egyptian sculpture that ended up in the Netherlands has been returned to Egypt.
description_zh: 一尊被盗3500年的埃及雕塑最终流落到荷兰，现已归还埃及。

title: Half Dutch households now have an emergency kit at home
title_zh: 现在，荷兰一半的家庭都在家中备有应急包。
description: Half of Dutch households now have an emergency kit at home or are in the process of putting one together,...
description_zh: 现在，一半的荷兰家庭家中都备有应急包，或者正在准备应急包……

title: High prices and room shortages lead more students to stay home
title_zh: 高昂的房价和房间短缺导致更多学生选择待在家中。
description: University and college students have become increasingly likely to stay living with their parents until graduation since the introduction of...
description_zh: 自引入……以来，大学生和学院学生毕业前与父母同住的可能性越来越大。

title: Labor Inspectorate investigating Arnhem hotel for exploiting asylum seekers, Ukrainians
title_zh: 劳动监察局正在调查阿纳姆一家酒店剥削寻求庇护者和乌克兰人的行为。
description: The Labor Inspectorate has launched an investigation into the Ibis Styles Hotel in Arnhem for exploiting approximately 20 asylum seekers and a group of Ukrainian refugees.
description_zh: 劳动监察局已对阿纳姆的宜必思尚品酒店展开调查，指控其剥削约 20 名寻求庇护者和一群乌克兰难民。

title: Wild police chase from Utrecht ends in crash across Belgian border
title_zh: 从乌得勒支出发的疯狂警匪追逐最终在比利时边境以撞车告终
description: A wild police chase that started in Utrecht ended across the Belgian border, when the car being chased crashed into a guardrail in Meer on Thursday night. The driver was injured.
description_zh: 周四晚间，一场始于乌得勒支的疯狂警匪追逐最终在比利时边境结束，被追逐的车辆在梅尔撞上护栏。司机受伤。

title: Weekend brings milder weather as icy conditions lift in north
title_zh: 周末气温回暖，北部地区的冰冻天气将逐渐消退。
description: The icy conditions which have hit the north hard over the past few says will ease over the weekend as...
description_zh: 过去几天袭击北方地区的冰冻天气将在周末有所缓解……

title: New Cabinet wants to drastically cut welfare benefits for high-income earners
title_zh: 新内阁希望大幅削减高收入者的福利待遇。
description: The new Jetten I Cabinet plans to significantly cut benefits for people who earned high incomes,
description_zh: 新任杰登内阁计划大幅削减高收入人群的福利。

title: Student loan system prevented many students from moving out during their studies
title_zh: 学生贷款制度使得许多学生在学习期间无法搬出宿舍。
description: Since the introduction of the student loan system, students have been staying with their parents for longer and longer.
description_zh: 自助学贷款制度实施以来，学生与父母同住的时间越来越长。

title: Going for gold: Dutch speed skaters ready for the Olympic ice
title_zh: 向金牌进发：荷兰速滑运动员已为奥运冰场做好准备
description: The opening ceremony for the winter Olympics takes place in Italy on Friday evening. Here’s what the Dutch team are...
description_zh: 冬季奥运会开幕式将于周五晚在意大利举行。以下是荷兰代表队的名单……

title: Greener greenery? Amsterdam decides to ditch pesticides
title_zh: 更绿的绿地？阿姆斯特丹决定弃用杀虫剂
description: Amsterdam city council has decided to buy only organic plants for its parks, offices and open spaces, amid rising concerns...
description_zh: 鉴于人们日益增长的担忧，阿姆斯特丹市议会决定只为公园、办公楼和开放空间购买有机植物……

title: Class is in session: a uniquely fun way to learn Dutch
title_zh: 课程开始了：一种独特而有趣的荷兰语学习方式
description: In these days of online and AI learning, the Dutch Brainwash course is decidedly (and purposefully) old school. Here’s why...
description_zh: 在如今网络学习和人工智能盛行的时代，荷兰洗脑课程却显得格外（而且是刻意地）遵循传统模式。原因如下……

title: Amsterdam to open Walk of Pride honoring LGBTQIA+ heroes this summer
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹将于今年夏天开放“骄傲之路”，向 LGBTQIA+ 英雄致敬
description: Amsterdam’s city center will get a Walk of Pride this summer, a walking route featuring special tiles bearing the names of heroes from the international LGBTQ+ community.
description_zh: 今年夏天，阿姆斯特丹市中心将迎来一条“骄傲之路”，这是一条步行路线，沿途铺设着特殊的瓷砖，上面刻有国际 LGBTQ+ 社群英雄的名字。

title: Dutch researchers working on nose spray that can prevent flu infections
title_zh: 荷兰研究人员正在研发一种可以预防流感感染的鼻喷雾剂
description: Dutch and American scientists are working on a nasal spray containing a broad-spectrum antibody against influenza that is proving effective against a wide variety of strains.
description_zh: 荷兰和美国的科学家正在研发一种含有广谱抗流感抗体的鼻喷雾剂，该喷雾剂已被证明对多种流感病毒株有效。

title: Watchdog says it can’t take action on newspaper report of asbestos in sand-based toys
title_zh: 监管机构表示，他们无法对报纸上关于沙基玩具中含有石棉的报道采取行动。
description: The Dutch Food and Consumer Product Safety Authority (NVWA) said Wednesday it cannot take action based solely on a newspaper report that found asbestos in children’s play sand sold in the Netherlan
description_zh: 荷兰食品和消费品安全局（NVWA）周三表示，仅凭一份报纸报道在荷兰销售的儿童游戏沙中发现石棉，该局不能采取行动。

title: Comedian Nadine Froughi's viral hits blend Dutch directness with her "outsider" view
title_zh: 喜剧演员娜丁·弗鲁吉的爆款视频融合了荷兰人的直率和她“局外人”的视角。
description: Nadine Froughi describes herself as "spiritually" Dutch, yet her comedy thrives on the friction between her adopted home and her complex, international roots.
description_zh: Nadine Froughi 自称“精神上”是荷兰人，但她的喜剧作品却以她所选择的祖国与她复杂的国际背景之间的摩擦为特色。

title: Dutch benefits agency illegally obtained passport photos to investigate welfare fraud
title_zh: 荷兰福利机构非法获取护照照片以调查福利欺诈行为
description: The Dutch Employee Insurance Agency (UWV) has been illegally requesting passport and ID photos from municipalities for years to investigate welfare fraud, according to internal documents obtained b
description_zh: 根据获取的内部文件显示，荷兰雇员保险局 (UWV) 多年来一直非法向市政当局索取护照和身份证照片，以调查福利欺诈行为。

title: Dutch Gambling Authority targets social media "share your bet" feature
title_zh: 荷兰博彩管理局将矛头指向社交媒体上的“分享你的投注”功能
description: The Dutch Gambling Authority (Ksa) is targeting the practice of sharing bets on social media, citing concerns that such promotions can reach vulnerable audiences.
description_zh: 荷兰博彩管理局 (Ksa) 正在打击在社交媒体上分享投注信息的行为，理由是此类推广活动可能会影响到弱势群体。

title: Man arrested for sharing Feyenoord director’s phone number online amid wave of threats
title_zh: 男子因在网上泄露费耶诺德俱乐部主管的电话号码而被捕，此前他已收到一系列威胁。
description: A 24-year-old man from The Hague was taken into custody on Thursday for publishing the mobile phone number of Feyenoord director Dennis te Kloese online.
description_zh: 周四，一名来自海牙的 24 岁男子因在网上公布费耶诺德俱乐部董事丹尼斯·特·克洛泽的手机号码而被拘留。

title: Court hears pill dealers knew customers were dying
title_zh: 法庭获悉，药丸贩子明知顾客会死亡。
description: The Public Prosecution Service (OM) is looking into nine additional deaths that may be connected to medicines purchased through the
description_zh: 公共检察署（OM）正在调查另外九起可能与通过以下方式购买的药品有关的死亡事件：

title: Closer monitoring and new technology aim to limit badger-related rail issues
title_zh: 更密切的监测和新技术旨在减少獾对铁路造成的危害。
description: ProRail announced on Thursday that it expects “almost no sudden major repairs or prolonged train disruptions caused by badgers” in the future.
description_zh: ProRail周四宣布，预计未来“几乎不会再发生由獾引起的突发性重大维修或长时间的列车中断”。

title: Energy bill determined by where you live; Northern provinces pay most
title_zh: 能源账单金额取决于您的居住地；北部省份的账单金额最高。
description: Households in the northern Netherlands faced higher heating costs this January than those in the south, according to comparison site Independer.
description_zh: 据比价网站 Independer 的数据显示，今年 1 月，荷兰北部家庭的取暖费用高于南部家庭。

title: Discrimination complaints to human rights institute soar 30%
title_zh: 人权机构收到的歧视投诉激增30%
description: The number of people reporting discrimination to the Dutch human rights institute rose sharply last year, though it remains unclear...
description_zh: 去年，向荷兰人权机构举报歧视事件的人数急剧上升，但具体原因仍不清楚……

title: Yesilgöz to become defence minister, Heinen stays at finance
title_zh: 耶希尔戈兹将出任国防部长，海宁继续担任财政部长。
description: The VVD published its list of preferred ministers and junior ministers on Thursday afternoon and as expected, party leader Dilan...
description_zh: 周四下午，自由民主人民党（VVD）公布了其属意的部长和副部长名单，不出所料，党魁迪兰……

title: Prison recommended for member of far-right group, which FvD seems to be recruiting from
title_zh: 建议将极右翼组织成员送进监狱，而范戴克似乎正在从该组织招募人员。
description: ThePublic Prosecution Service(OM) recommended a prison sentence of
description_zh: 公共检察署（OM）建议判处监禁

title: VVD leader Dilan Yeşilgöz to become Minister of Defense and Deputy Prime Minister
title_zh: VVD领导人迪兰·耶希尔戈兹将出任国防部长兼副总理
description: VVD leader Dilan Yeşilgöz has announced in the Tweede Kamer, the lower house of Dutch parliament, that she is leaving her party’s parliamentary group to take up the roles of Minister of Defense and
description_zh: 荷兰自由民主人民党（VVD）领导人迪兰·耶希尔戈兹在荷兰议会下院（Tweede Kamer）宣布，她将离开该党的议会党团，出任国防部长和

title: Major drug investigation sees 10 arrests in 14 raids around Rotterdam, The Hague
title_zh: 一项重大毒品调查在鹿特丹和海牙周边地区展开14次突袭行动，逮捕10人。
description: Ten men were arrested and 14 properties were searched during a major drug-trafficking operation on Monday.
description_zh: 周一，警方开展了一次大规模缉毒行动，逮捕了10名男子，并搜查了14处房产。

title: Potential sabotage on brand new Belgian minehunter; Netherlands bought same ship
title_zh: 一艘崭新的比利时扫雷舰可能遭到破坏；荷兰也购买了同一款舰艇。
description: A sea trial with a new Belgian navy ship did not go as planned this week. The minehunter suddenly started smoking. Belgium suspects sabotage may be involved.
description_zh: 本周，比利时海军一艘新型扫雷舰的海上试航并未按计划进行。该舰突然冒出浓烟。比利时方面怀疑此事可能与人为破坏有关。

title: Extremist links emerge on Forum local election candidate lists
title_zh: 论坛地方选举候选人名单中出现极端主义关联
description: A number of people with links to extremist organisations are running on behalf of far right party Forum for Democracy...
description_zh: 一些与极端组织有关联的人正在代表极右翼政党“民主论坛”参选……

title: Homeless Romanian man should not be prosecuted for sleeping outside, court rules
title_zh: 法院裁定，不应起诉露宿街头的罗马尼亚无家可归男子。
description: A court has ruled that the Public Prosecution Service was wrong to pursue charges against a man sleeping rough in Utrecht.
description_zh: 法院裁定，检控署对一名在乌得勒支露宿街头的男子提起诉讼是错误的。

title: Coalition cabinet: 18 ministers and 10 juniors in new line-up
title_zh: 联合政府内阁：新阵容包括18名部长和10名初级部长
description: The three parties forming the next Dutch government have reached agreement on dividing up 18 ministerial roles and 10 junior...
description_zh: 组成下一届荷兰政府的三个政党已就18个部长职位和10个初级职位的分配达成协议……
